title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-23
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished watering the plants and updating the daily app metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse listings.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel robot with a watering can tending to pixelated code-plants in a greenhouse, with the bee mascot hovering nearby holding a tiny clipboard to check off metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head using a watering can on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a small clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
